name: mutagen
description: End-to-end agentic design workflow. Thirteen personas execute PRD/ADR/DDD/ISC/DSD design bundles through Shredder's dependency-ordered slicing and Karai's reviewed dispatch.

interface.shortDescription: Agentic design workflow with explicit slice-and-dispatch discipline
interface.longDescription: Mutagen drives a five-document design bundle (PRD, ADR, DDD, ISC, DSD) through dependency-ordered slicing and reviewed dispatch. April interviews the user and authors the bundle; Shredder slices it; Karai dispatches each slice to the appropriate executor persona (Bebop, Baxter, Chaplin, Metalhead, Splinter, Tatsu, Krang); Bishop and Tiger Claw review in parallel. Explicit invocation only — every skill requires $mutagen-* entry.
defaultPrompt: Run /$mutagen-status to inspect the workflow state.
Kick off a design bundle with /$mutagen-elicit.
Execute the next pending slice via /$mutagen-execute-next.
